Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Once all aircraft have launched, let's see how to manage them within a formation. Formation controls apply both to ships and aircraft.
All formations have a Formation Leader. You can select this unit by clicking on any unit within the formation and then clicking the middle mouse button (MMB).

By default, all formation units will follow the Formation Leader's waypoints, altitude, and speed orders. For aircraft, we can edit the formation type and spacing by right clicking and then going to Formation and then Pattern or Spacing. Let's leave our attack aircraft in the 'Vic' formation for now.
